title: Tears & Lava Backport
description: Backports a new «Tears» and «Lava Chicken» music disks
body:
## 🔥 **About**
This mod backports the music disks **«Tears»** and **«Lava Chicken»**, created by **Amos Roddy** and **Hyper Potions**.
The music disc «Tears» will be dropped by Ghast, who died from a fireball, and the music disc «Lava Chicken» will be dropped by Baby Zombie, riding on a chicken.

## ⭐ **Extra / Q&A**
**Q:** Will this mod be on Fabric?

**A:** I don't know, maybe someday
